title: Canelex Keystrokes Revamp
description: A revamp of the original Keystrokes mod from Canelex
body: # Canelex Keystrokes Revamp ![Dev Workflow Status](https://img.shields.io/github/v/release/Polyfrost/Canelex-KeyStrokes-Revamp.svg?style=for-the-badge&color=1452cc&label=release) ### A remake of the original Keystrokes mod by Canelex. Allows customizing: - Scale - Mouse Keystrokes - Jump Keystrokes - Arrow Keystrokes - Pressed / Unpressed Background Color - Pressed / Unpressed Text Color - Fading Time - Shadow - Show in Chat - Show in GUIs - Show in F3
